title: Peppery Corn and Spice Treat
description: A kid-friendly tunisian dish featuring creamy corn, spices, and a touch of heat for an adult-approved treat that's both savory and slightly spicy.

ingredients.name: Saffron Threads
ingredients.notes: To taste, can be soaked in warm water for a minute before using.

instructions: In a small bowl, combine the creamed corn with saffron threads and red pepper flakes. Mix well.
Add salt to taste. Stir gently until fully combined.
Sprinkle cumin seeds over the mixture. Stir again to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
If desired, add fresh basil leaves for a pop of color and freshness.
Gently fold in heavy cream using a spatula or spoon to mix it thoroughly with the other ingredients.
